prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次约 13368→12770→10874→9460→11188 名。2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（从 13368 升至 9460），2025 年出现明显后移至 11188 名，回退约 1728 名，近 2 年波动幅度较大。2025 年基准位次约 11188 名；该校在安徽省物理类（含理科）招生计划：2021 年 121 人、2022 年 124 人、2023 年 123 人、2024 年 117 人、2025 年 126 人；2026 年计划 126 人，与 2025 年持平。计划人数近年总体稳定在 117–126 人之间，2026 年未扩招也未缩招，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工程大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从 2021 年第 50 名持续上升至 2025/2026 年第 43 名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；2026 年声誉评价未出现该校负面舆情信号；抖音热度总排名第 27 位（较热），主要传播内容为张雪峰推荐水声工程、'三海一核'特色及国防七子标签，正面曝光度较高；2021–2025 年均无投档断档或异常记录，报考心理预期稳定偏正面；第五轮学科评估中，控制科学与工程获评 A 等级，是该校唯一 A- 及以上学科，对应自动化类、机器人工程、人工智能等招生专业，对工科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度 2024 年小幅降温但仍属推荐，电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、能源动力等专业 2024 年均获高热推荐或推荐，与该校工科优势方向高度匹配；安徽省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 45.1 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计 46.2 万略有下降，物理类考生估算约 31.3 万（较 2025 年 32.1 万减少约 2.4%），考生总数微降对竞争有轻微缓解；省控线方面，物理类本科批从 2024 年 465 分降至 2025 年 461 分，整体分数线略降；该校位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距安徽省较远，属跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移后的回调压力、软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强、抖音正面热度较高、2026 年招生计划持平、安徽省物理类考生总数微降等因素，预计 2026 年报考热度较 2025 年略有回升，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约 11108 名，区间 10608–11608 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 13368, 12770, 10874, 9460, and 11188 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (rising from 13368 to 9460), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift to 11188, a retreat of about 1728 places, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11188. The enrollment plan for this university in Anhui Province Physics Category (including Science) was: 121 in 2021, 124 in 2022, 123 in 2023, 117 in 2024, and 126 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 126, unchanged from 2025. The planned number of students has been generally stable between 117 and 126 in recent years, with no expansion or contraction in 2026, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Engineering University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2025/2026, indicating continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2026, there were no negative public opinion signals regarding the university's reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 27th overall (relatively hot), with main content including Zhang Xuefeng's recommendation of Underwater Acoustics Engineering, the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' characteristics, and the label of National Defense Seven Sons, resulting in high positive exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no instances of enrollment gaps or anomalies, and the psychological expectations for application are stable and slightly positive. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A- or above discipline at this university, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Automation, Robotics Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence, which strongly attract engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science cooled slightly in 2024 but remains recommended. Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power were all highly recommended or recommended in 2024, closely matching the university's engineering strengths. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, a slight decrease from the combined 462,000 Physics and History Category takers in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category takers is about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from 321,000 in 2025), slightly easing competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Physics Category undergraduate batch dropped from 465 in 2024 to 461 in 2025, with overall score lines slightly decreasing. The university is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, relatively far from Anhui Province, making it a cross-province application.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the correction pressure after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the increased attractiveness due to the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings, high positive Douyin popularity, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category takers in Anhui Province, it is expected that the application popularity in 2026 will slightly recover compared to 2025, with rankings moving forward slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11108, with a range of 10608 to 11608.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10608–11608, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, etc., the 'Three Seas and One Nuclear' characteristic majors). Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Electronic Information) can be used as reach choices, while Tier 3 majors (Mechanical, Materials, Energy and Power) serve as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10608), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
